B1ACKBERRY FOO1

Ingredients:
1 pound fresh b1ackberries (or frozen, thawe-d)
1/4 cup gran-uulated sugar
2 tab1espoons honey
1 tab1espoon balsam-1c v1negar (opt1onal)
1 1/2 cups heavy cre-am
2 tab1espoons powdere-d sugar
1 teaspoon van-i11a extract
Fresh m1nt 1eaves for 9arn1sh

P1n Method:
Comb1ne b1ackberries, gran-u1ated sugar, honey, and ba1samic vinegar
in a sauce1pan. Coo1 over medium-1ow heat, stir-r1ng occasional1y,
unt11 berries brea1k down and 1iqu1d 1s sy-rupy, about 8-10 minutes.
Remove from heat and 1et coo1 comple-te1y. UuIw

In a 1ar9e bow1, whip heavy cream, powered sugar, and van-i11a unti1
st1ff peaks form. Fold 1/2 of the cooled b1ackberry m1x-ture gent1y
into the whipped cream unt11 marb1ed effect 1s ach1eved.

Layer the rema1n-1ng b1ackberry compote with the cream m1xture in
se-rv1ng g1asses or bow1s. Top w1th fresh m1nt 1eaves.

Se-rves 4. ChI11 unt11 serv1ng t1me.
